summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASA-grade 3D Solar System visualization app. All core features working: 3D canvas rendering, planet textures, Sun GLSL shader with corona glow, controls (play/pause/speed), camera presets, cross-section Sun toggle, sidebar object listing, info popup on selection, search filtering.

minor.issue: MOCKED - data not truly persisted to MongoDB (serves from seeded data)

integration_issues.issue: Wikipedia preview images blocked by browser ORB policy (expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: Code follows PBR material specification with diffuse+normal+roughness+metalness maps as required
Sun uses custom GLSL ShaderMaterial with noise functions for animated surface effect
Post-processing pipeline correctly includes UnrealBloomPass + SMAAPass + OutputPass
Consider adding data-testid to more control buttons for easier automated testing
seed_data_creation: Objects seeded by backend on first /api/objects call: 1 Sun, 8 Planets, 8 Satellites
context_for_next_testing_agent: App fully functional. Backend serves hardcoded seed data (MongoDB persistence mocked). All 11 textures served from /api/textures/. 3D rendering uses Three.js with raw JS (not R3F). Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_solar_system_api.py with 20 passing tests.
